title: samanea marginata
intro: Samanea marginata, also known as the "Raintree" or "Rain Tree", is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Samanea marginata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
